# VER-QUIC-CRT-0003 - QUIC Connection Runtime Endpoint Ingress Verification

## Scope

This slice covers ingress classification, routing, endpoint-owned stateless-reset bookkeeping, and the endpoint emission policy that bounds reset send frequency. It does not prove the broader connection lifecycle or migration policy.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0002
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0012
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0013
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0014
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0015
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0016
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0080
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0082
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0083
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0085
- REQ-QUIC-CRT-0086

## Verification Method

Focused requirement-home tests and inspection evidence from the endpoint ingress classifier, route registries, and reset-token registry.

## Preconditions

- The Incursa.Quic solution builds successfully.
- The CRT requirement traits are discoverable by the test runner.
- The endpoint ingress wrapper remains internal and the endpoint-owned registries stay isolated from connection-owned state.

## Procedure or Approach

- Run the endpoint ingress requirement-home tests for REQ-QUIC-CRT-0012, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0013, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0015, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0016, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0080, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0082, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0083, REQ-QUIC-CRT-0085, and REQ-QUIC-CRT-0086.
- Confirm the routed cases deliver `QuicConnectionPacketReceivedEvent` to the correct runtime and the reset cases only match when the endpoint binding and token ownership are current.
- Confirm discard and retire effects remove the endpoint-owned route and token entries before later datagrams are retried.
- Confirm the endpoint emission policy rejects reset responses that would violate loop-prevention or per-remote-address send limits.

## Expected Result

Version negotiation and retry stay endpoint-handled, long and short packets route to the correct runtime, malformed or unknown datagrams stay unroutable, stateless resets match only the current remote address and live binding, stateless-reset emission remains bounded to avoid loops or oracle behavior, and explicit effects retire route and token ownership cleanly.
